title: Enable IAM Access analyzer for IAM policies about all resources in each region.
fix: Enable IAM Access analyzer across all regions.

title: AWS AMI data source should specify owners
fix: Specify the owners field in the AWS AMI data source configuration

title: API Gateway stages for V1 and V2 should have access logging enabled
fix: Enable logging for API Gateway stages

title: API Gateway must have cache enabled
fix: Enable cache encryption

title: API Gateway must have X-Ray tracing enabled
fix: Enable tracing

title: No unauthorized access to API Gateway methods
fix: Use and authorization method or require API Key

title: API Gateway domain name uses outdated SSL/TLS protocols.
fix: Use the most modern TLS/SSL policies available

title: Ensure that response caching is enabled for your Amazon API Gateway REST APIs.
fix: Enable cache

title: Athena databases and workgroup configurations are created unencrypted at rest by default, they should be encrypted
fix: Enable encryption at rest for Athena databases and workgroup configurations

title: Athena workgroups should enforce configuration to prevent client disabling encryption
fix: Enforce the configuration to prevent client overrides

title: Cloudfront distribution should have Access Logging configured
fix: Enable logging for CloudFront distributions

title: CloudFront distribution does not have a WAF in front.
fix: Enable WAF for the CloudFront distribution

title: CloudFront distribution allows unencrypted (HTTP) communications.
fix: Only allow HTTPS for CloudFront distribution communication

title: CloudFront distribution uses outdated SSL/TLS protocols.
fix: Use the most modern TLS/SSL policies available

title: Cloudtrail should be enabled in all regions regardless of where your AWS resources are generally homed
fix: Enable Cloudtrail in all regions

title: CloudTrail should use Customer managed keys to encrypt the logs
fix: Use Customer managed key

title: Cloudtrail log validation should be enabled to prevent tampering of log data
fix: Turn on log validation for Cloudtrail

title: The S3 Bucket backing Cloudtrail should be private
fix: Restrict public access to the S3 bucket

title: CloudTrail logs should be stored in S3 and also sent to CloudWatch Logs
fix: Enable logging to CloudWatch

title: You should enable bucket access logging on the CloudTrail S3 bucket.
fix: Enable access logging on the bucket

title: CloudWatch log groups should be encrypted using CMK
fix: Enable CMK encryption of CloudWatch Log Groups

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for unauthorized API calls
fix: Create an alarm to alert on unauthorized API calls

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for AWS Management Console sign-in without MFA
fix: Create an alarm to alert on non MFA logins

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for usage of root user
fix: Create an alarm to alert on root user login

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for IAM policy changes
fix: Create an alarm to alert on IAM Policy changes

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for CloudTrail configuration changes
fix: Create an alarm to alert on CloudTrail configuration changes

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for AWS Management Console authentication failures
fix: Create an alarm to alert on console login failures

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for disabling or scheduled deletion of customer managed keys
fix: Create an alarm to alert on CMKs being disabled or scheduled for deletion

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for S3 bucket policy changes
fix: Create an alarm to alert on S3 Bucket policy changes

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for AWS Config configuration changes
fix: Create an alarm to alert on AWS Config configuration changes

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for security group changes
fix: Create an alarm to alert on security group changes

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for changes to Network Access Control Lists (NACL)
fix: Create an alarm to alert on network acl changes

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for changes to network gateways
fix: Create an alarm to alert on network gateway changes

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for route table changes
fix: Create an alarm to alert on route table changes

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for VPC changes
fix: Create an alarm to alert on route table changes

title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for organisation changes
fix: Create an alarm to alert on organisation changes

title: CodeBuild Project artifacts encryption should not be disabled
fix: Enable encryption for CodeBuild project artifacts

title: Config configuration aggregator should be using all regions for source
fix: Set the aggregator to cover all regions

title: DocumentDB logs export should be enabled
fix: Enable export logs

title: DocumentDB storage must be encrypted
fix: Enable storage encryption

title: DocumentDB encryption should use Customer Managed Keys
fix: Enable encryption using customer managed keys

title: DAX Cluster should always encrypt data at rest
fix: Enable encryption at rest for DAX Cluster

title: Point in time recovery should be enabled to protect DynamoDB table
fix: Enable point in time recovery

title: DynamoDB tables should use at rest encryption with a Customer Managed Key
fix: Enable server side encryption with a customer managed key

title: Launch configuration with unencrypted block device.
fix: Turn on encryption for all block devices

title: Launch configuration should not have a public IP address.
fix: Set the instance to not be publicly accessible

title: EBS volumes must be encrypted
fix: Enable encryption of EBS volumes

title: EBS volume encryption should use Customer Managed Keys
fix: Enable encryption using customer managed keys

title: aws_instance should activate session tokens for Instance Metadata Service.
fix: Enable HTTP token requirement for IMDS

title: User data for EC2 instances must not contain sensitive AWS keys
fix: Remove sensitive data from the EC2 instance user-data

title: Missing description for security group.
fix: Add descriptions for all security groups

title: AWS best practice to not use the default VPC for workflows
fix: Create a non-default vpc for resources to be created in

title: An Network ACL rule allows ALL ports.
fix: Set specific allowed ports

title: A security group rule should not allow unrestricted egress to any IP address.
fix: Set a more restrictive cidr range

title: Network ACLs should not allow unrestricted ingress to SSH or RDP from any IP address.
fix: Set a more restrictive CIDR range

title: Security groups should not allow unrestricted ingress to SSH or RDP from any IP address.
fix: Set a more restrictive CIDR range

title: Ensure all data stored in the launch configuration EBS is securely encrypted
fix: Don't use sensitive data in user data

title: Missing description for security group rule.
fix: Add descriptions for all security groups rules

title: User data for EC2 instances must not contain sensitive AWS keys
fix: Remove sensitive data from the EC2 instance user-data generated by launch templates

title: aws_instance should activate session tokens for Instance Metadata Service.
fix: Enable HTTP token requirement for IMDS

title: Instance with unencrypted block device.
fix: Turn on encryption for all block devices

title: Instances in a subnet should not receive a public IP address by default.
fix: Set the instance to not be publicly accessible

title: Default security group should restrict all traffic
fix: Configure default security group to restrict all traffic

title: VPC Flow Logs is a feature that enables you to capture information about the IP traffic going to and from network interfaces in your VPC. After you've created a flow log, you can view and retrieve its data in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. It is recommended that VPC Flow Logs be enabled for packet "Rejects" for VPCs.
fix: Enable flow logs for VPC

title: ECR repository has image scans disabled.
fix: Enable ECR image scanning

title: ECR images tags shouldn't be mutable.
fix: Only use immutable images in ECR

title: ECR repository policy must block public access
fix: Do not allow public access in the policy

title: ECR Repository should use customer managed keys to allow more control
fix: Use customer managed keys

title: ECS clusters should have container insights enabled
fix: Enable Container Insights

title: ECS Task Definitions with EFS volumes should use in-transit encryption
fix: Enable in transit encryption when using efs

title: Task definition defines sensitive environment variable(s).
fix: Use secrets for the task definition

title: EFS Encryption has not been enabled
fix: Enable encryption for EFS

title: EKS Clusters should have cluster control plane logging turned on
fix: Enable logging for the EKS control plane

title: EKS should have the encryption of secrets enabled
fix: Enable encryption of EKS secrets

title: EKS Clusters should have the public access disabled
fix: Don't enable public access to EKS Clusters

title: EKS cluster should not have open CIDR range for public access
fix: Don't enable public access to EKS Clusters

title: Elasticache Replication Group stores unencrypted data at-rest.
fix: Enable at-rest encryption for replication group

title: Missing description for security group/security group rule.
fix: Add descriptions for all security groups and rules

title: Redis cluster should have backup retention turned on
fix: Configure snapshot retention for redis cluster

title: Elasticache Replication Group uses unencrypted traffic.
fix: Enable in transit encryption for replication group

title: Domain logging should be enabled for Elastic Search domains
fix: Enable logging for ElasticSearch domains

title: Elasticsearch domain uses plaintext traffic for node to node communication.
fix: Enable encrypted node to node communication

title: Elasticsearch doesn't enforce HTTPS traffic.
fix: Enforce the use of HTTPS for ElasticSearch

title: Elasticsearch domain isn't encrypted at rest.
fix: Enable ElasticSearch domain encryption

title: Elasticsearch domain endpoint is using outdated TLS policy.
fix: Use the most modern TLS/SSL policies available

title: An outdated SSL policy is in use by a load balancer.
fix: Use a more recent TLS/SSL policy for the load balancer

title: Load balancers should drop invalid headers
fix: Set drop_invalid_header_fields to true

title: Load balancer is exposed to the internet.
fix: Switch to an internal load balancer or add a tfsec ignore

title: Use of plain HTTP.
fix: Switch to HTTPS to benefit from TLS security features

title: Enable at-rest encryption for EMR clusters.
fix: Enable at-rest encryption for EMR cluster

title: Enable in-transit encryption for EMR clusters.
fix: Enable in-transit encryption for EMR cluster

title: Enable local-disk encryption for EMR clusters.
fix: Enable local-disk encryption for EMR cluster

title: IAM Password policy should prevent password reuse.
fix: Prevent password reuse in the policy

title: IAM policy should avoid use of wildcards and instead apply the principle of least privilege
fix: Specify the exact permissions required, and to which resources they should apply instead of using wildcards.

title: IAM Password policy should have requirement for at least one lowercase character.
fix: Enforce longer, more complex passwords in the policy

title: IAM Password policy should have requirement for at least one number in the password.
fix: Enforce longer, more complex passwords in the policy

title: IAM Password policy should have requirement for at least one symbol in the password.
fix: Enforce longer, more complex passwords in the policy

title: IAM Password policy should have requirement for at least one uppercase character.
fix: Enforce longer, more complex passwords in the policy

title: IAM Password policy should have expiry less than or equal to 90 days.
fix: Limit the password duration with an expiry in the policy

title: IAM Password policy should have minimum password length of 14 or more characters.
fix: Enforce longer, more complex passwords in the policy

title: IAM groups should have MFA enforcement activated.
fix: Use terraform-module/enforce-mfa/aws to ensure that MFA is enforced

title: The "root" account has unrestricted access to all resources in the AWS account. It is highly recommended that the use of this account be avoided.
fix: Use lower privileged accounts instead, so only required privileges are available.

title: The root user has complete access to all services and resources in an AWS account. AWS Access Keys provide programmatic access to a given account.
fix: Use lower privileged accounts instead, so only required privileges are available.

title: The "root" account has unrestricted access to all resources in the AWS account. It is highly recommended that this account have MFA enabled.
fix: Enable MFA on the root user account.

title: IAM policies should not be granted directly to users.
fix: Grant policies at the group level instead.

title: Credentials which are no longer used should be disabled.
fix: Disable credentials which are no longer used.

title: IAM Users should have MFA enforcement activated.
fix: Enable MFA for the user account

title: Access keys should be rotated at least every 90 days
fix: Rotate keys every 90 days or less

title: The "root" account has unrestricted access to all resources in the AWS account. It is highly recommended that this account have hardware MFA enabled.
fix: Enable hardware MFA on the root user account.

title: Disabling or removing unnecessary credentials will reduce the window of opportunity for credentials associated with a compromised or abandoned account to be used.
fix: Disable credentials which are no longer used.

title: No user should have more than one active access key.
fix: Limit the number of active access keys to one key per user.

title: Delete expired TLS certificates
fix: Remove expired certificates

title: Missing IAM Role to allow authorized users to manage incidents with AWS Support.
fix: Create an IAM role with the necessary permissions to manage incidents with AWS Support.

title: IAM Pass Role Filtering
fix: Resolve permission escalations by denying pass role'

title: Disallow unrestricted S3 IAM Policies
fix: Create more restrictive S3 policies

title: Reduce unnecessary unauthorized access or information disclosure of S3 buckets.
fix: Allowing Get* along with Put* on all Resources can potentially allow unauthorized access and/or information disclosure from sensitive buckets.

title: Kinesis stream is unencrypted.
fix: Enable in transit encryption

title: A KMS key is not configured to auto-rotate.
fix: Configure KMS key to auto rotate

title: Lambda functions should have X-Ray tracing enabled
fix: Enable tracing

title: Ensure that lambda function permission has a source arn specified
fix: Always provide a source arn for Lambda permissions

title: MQ Broker should have audit logging enabled
fix: Enable audit logging

title: MQ Broker should have general logging enabled
fix: Enable general logging

title: Ensure MQ Broker is not publicly exposed
fix: Disable public access when not required

title: A MSK cluster allows unencrypted data in transit.
fix: Enable in transit encryption

title: Ensure MSK Cluster logging is enabled
fix: Enable logging

title: A MSK cluster allows unencrypted data at rest.
fix: Enable at rest encryption

title: Neptune logs export should be enabled
fix: Enable export logs

title: Neptune storage must be encrypted at rest
fix: Enable encryption of Neptune storage

title: Neptune encryption should use Customer Managed Keys
fix: Enable encryption using customer managed keys

title: RDS Cluster and RDS instance should have backup retention longer than default 1 day
fix: Explicitly set the retention period to greater than the default

title: Performance Insights encryption should use Customer Managed Keys
fix: Use Customer Managed Keys to encrypt Performance Insights data

title: There is no encryption specified or encryption is disabled on the RDS Cluster.
fix: Enable encryption for RDS clusters

title: RDS encryption has not been enabled at a DB Instance level.
fix: Enable encryption for RDS instances

title: Enable Performance Insights to detect potential problems
fix: Enable performance insights

title: RDS IAM Database Authentication Disabled
fix: Modify the PostgreSQL and MySQL type RDS instances to enable IAM database authentication.

title: RDS Deletion Protection Disabled
fix: Modify the RDS instances to enable deletion protection.

title: RDS Publicly Accessible
fix: Remove the public endpoint from the RDS instance.

title: RDS Cluster Deletion Protection Disabled
fix: Modify the RDS clusters to enable deletion protection.

title: Missing description for security group/security group rule.
fix: Add descriptions for all security groups and rules

title: Redshift clusters should use at rest encryption
fix: Enable encryption using CMK

title: AWS Classic resource usage.
fix: Switch to VPC resources

title: Redshift cluster should be deployed into a specific VPC
fix: Deploy Redshift cluster into a non default VPC

title: S3 Access block should block public ACL
fix: Enable blocking any PUT calls with a public ACL specified

title: S3 Access block should block public policy
fix: Prevent policies that allow public access being PUT

title: Unencrypted S3 bucket.
fix: Configure bucket encryption

title: S3 Bucket Logging
fix: Add a logging block to the resource to enable access logging

title: S3 Data should be versioned
fix: Enable versioning to protect against accidental/malicious removal or modification

title: S3 Access Block should Ignore Public ACL
fix: Enable ignoring the application of public ACLs in PUT calls

title: S3 Buckets not publicly accessible through ACL.
fix: Don't use canned ACLs or switch to private acl

title: S3 Access block should restrict public bucket to limit access
fix: Limit the access to public buckets to only the owner or AWS Services (eg; CloudFront)

title: S3 buckets should each define an aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block
fix: Define a aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block for the given bucket to control public access policies

title: S3 encryption should use Customer Managed Keys
fix: Use SSE-KMS with a customer managed key (CMK)

title: Buckets should have MFA deletion protection enabled.
fix: Enable MFA deletion protection on the bucket

title: S3 object-level API operations such as GetObject, DeleteObject, and PutObject are called data events. By default, CloudTrail trails don't log data events and so it is recommended to enable Object-level logging for S3 buckets.
fix: Enable Object-level logging for S3 buckets.

title: S3 object-level API operations such as GetObject, DeleteObject, and PutObject are called data events. By default, CloudTrail trails don't log data events and so it is recommended to enable Object-level logging for S3 buckets.
fix: Enable Object-level logging for S3 buckets.

title: S3 DNS Compliant Bucket Names
fix: Recreate S3 bucket to use - instead of . in S3 bucket names

title: SAM API must have data cache enabled
fix: Enable cache encryption

title: SAM API must have X-Ray tracing enabled
fix: Enable tracing

title: SAM API domain name uses outdated SSL/TLS protocols.
fix: Use the most modern TLS/SSL policies available

title: SAM API stages for V1 and V2 should have access logging enabled
fix: Enable logging for API Gateway stages

title: Function policies should avoid use of wildcards and instead apply the principle of least privilege
fix: Specify the exact permissions required, and to which resources they should apply instead of using wildcards.

title: SAM HTTP API stages for V1 and V2 should have access logging enabled
fix: Enable logging for API Gateway stages

title: SAM State machine must have X-Ray tracing enabled
fix: Enable tracing

title: SAM State machine must have logging enabled
fix: Enable logging

title: State machine policies should avoid use of wildcards and instead apply the principle of least privilege
fix: Specify the exact permissions required, and to which resources they should apply instead of using wildcards.

title: SAM Simple table must have server side encryption enabled.
fix: Enable server side encryption

title: SAM Function must have X-Ray tracing enabled
fix: Enable tracing

title: Unencrypted SNS topic.
fix: Turn on SNS Topic encryption

title: SNS topic not encrypted with CMK.
fix: Use a CMK for SNS Topic encryption

title: Unencrypted SQS queue.
fix: Turn on SQS Queue encryption

title: AWS SQS policy document has wildcard action statement.
fix: Keep policy scope to the minimum that is required to be effective

title: SQS queue should be encrypted with a CMK.
fix: Encrypt SQS Queue with a customer-managed key

title: Secrets Manager should use customer managed keys
fix: Use customer managed keys

title: Secrets should not be exfiltrated using Terraform HTTP data blocks
fix: Remove this potential exfiltration HTTP request.

title: Root and user volumes on Workspaces should be encrypted
fix: Root and user volume encryption should be enabled
